versions.version_description: Simple chords in the original key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[ch]Gm[/ch]
[tab]            [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]
It can't be said I'm an early bird[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
It's 10 o'clock before I say a word[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]F[/ch]
Baby, I can never tell[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]D[/ch]
How do you sleep so well?[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Gm[/ch]
You keep tellin' me to live right[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
To go to bed before the daylight[/tab]

[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]
But then you wake up for the sunrise[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]Bb[/ch]
You know you don't gotta pretend[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
Baby, now and then[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                            [ch]Gm[/ch]
Don't you just wanna wake up[/tab]

Dark as a lake
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
Smellin' like a bonfire[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Lost in a haze?[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]
If you're drunk on life, babe[/tab]

I think it's great
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]
But while in this world[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]   [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I think I'll take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
I take my whiskеy neat[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're too sweet for mе[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]

[Non-Lyrical Vocals]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I aim low[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
I aim true, and the ground's where I go[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]Eb[/ch]
I work late where I'm free from the phone[/tab]

And the job gets done
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
But you worry some, I know[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Gm[/ch]
But who wants to live forever, babe?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You treat your mouth as if it's Heaven's gate[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]Eb[/ch]
The rest of you like you're the TSA[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Bb[/ch]
I wish that I could go along[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Babe, don't get me wrong[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                                    [ch]Gm[/ch]
You know you're bright as the morning[/tab]

As soft as the rain
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch]
Pretty as a vine[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
As sweet as a grape[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Eb[/ch]
If you can sit in a barrel[/tab]

Maybe I'll wait
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
Until that day[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]                         [ch]Gm[/ch]
I'd rather I'll take my whiskey neat[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
I take my whiskеy neat[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're too sweet for mе[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]

[Non-Lyrical Vocals]
[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[ch]Gm[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]Eb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

[Outro]
[tab]                  [ch]Gm[/ch]
I take my whiskеy neat[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
My coffee black and my bed at three[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Eb[/ch]
You're too sweet for mе[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]F[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
You're too sweet for me[/tab]
